    Methods in org.apache.datafusion with parameters of type CsvReadOptions
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DataFrame
    SessionContext.readCsv(String path, CsvReadOptions options)
    Read a CSV file as a DataFrame with the supplied CsvReadOptions.
    void
    SessionContext.registerCsv(String name, String path, CsvReadOptions options)
    Register a CSV file (or directory of CSV files) as a table with the supplied CsvReadOptions.
